data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of digital products, specifically download links, as part of the service offering. However, while the linked use case mentions a digital option ('Hair Care Guide' PDF download included), there is no concrete evidence from API reads or persisted state checks that confirms the functionality of providing these download links. This lack of direct evidence leads to a gap in satisfying the requirement for digital products.
gaps: No evidence confirming the functionality of providing digital products (download links).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
